evals.name: security-flawed-plan
evals.prompt:
I need you to run a quorum review on this auth service implementation plan. Use claude:sonnet, gemini:flash, and codex as the panel.

The plan is at /Users/Shared/git/agent-skills/quorum-review-workspace/iteration-1/security-flawed-plan/plan.md
evals.expected_output: Should catch multiple critical security issues (SQL injection, weak hashing, hardcoded secrets, no rate limiting, XSS via stack traces, password logging). Should produce REVISE verdict with clear blocking issues. Cross-critique should converge on the most critical blockers.

assertions.description: At least one blocking issue mentions SQL injection or string interpolation in queries
At least one blocking issue mentions SHA-256 is insufficient (should be bcrypt/argon2/scrypt)
At least one issue mentions the hardcoded JWT secret key
Final derived verdict is REVISE (not APPROVED)
Output contains canonical issue IDs (BLK-xxx or B1/B2) and a clearly formatted verdict section
At least one issue mentions the risk of logging passwords

evals.name: solid-api-design
evals.prompt:
Review this document processing API plan with a quorum. Use claude:sonnet gemini:flash codex

Plan: /Users/Shared/git/agent-skills/quorum-review-workspace/iteration-1/solid-api-design/plan.md
evals.expected_output: Should approve or raise only minor non-blocking issues. The plan is well-designed with proper auth, error handling, observability, and testing. False-positive blocking issues would indicate a problem with the skill.

assertions.description: Zero or at most 1 surviving blocking issue (the plan is well-designed)
Final derived verdict is APPROVED
Review acknowledges good practices in the plan (auth, error handling, observability, testing)
Output contains proper formatting with issue IDs and a clear verdict section

evals.name: complex-migration
evals.prompt:
get a quorum on this migration plan, panel should be claude:sonnet gemini:flash codex --max-rounds 2

here's the plan: /Users/Shared/git/agent-skills/quorum-review-workspace/iteration-1/complex-migration/plan.md
evals.expected_output: Should identify subtle issues: Phase 3 dual-write consistency, Phase 4 no-rollback risk, synchronous HTTP coupling, lack of saga/compensation pattern. Should handle casual invocation style. Nuanced verdict — possibly REVISE with specific architectural concerns.

assertions.description: At least one issue mentions dual-write consistency or transactional outbox concerns
At least one issue mentions Phase 4 being a point of no return / no rollback plan
At least one issue mentions synchronous HTTP coupling risk in the checkout flow
Final verdict is REVISE (the plan has real architectural gaps)
Output contains canonical issue IDs and clear verdict section

evals.name: code-clean-approval
evals.prompt:
Review this code diff with a quorum. Use claude:sonnet, gemini:pro, and codex as the panel. Run in --mode code.

The diff is at /Users/Shared/git/agent-skills/quorum-review-workspace/iteration-2/code-clean-approval.patch
evals.expected_output: Should approve a safe refactor that replaces string interpolation with parameterized SQL and adds basic input validation. No blocking issues should survive.

assertions.description: Final derived verdict is APPROVED
No surviving blocking issues are reported
Output includes code-review anchors or diff hunk references

evals.name: code-duplicate-merge
evals.prompt:
Review this code diff with a quorum. Use claude:sonnet, gemini:pro, and codex as the panel. Run in --mode code.

The diff is at /Users/Shared/git/agent-skills/quorum-review-workspace/iteration-2/code-duplicate-merge.patch
evals.expected_output: Should flag the missing admin authorization check. Equivalent findings from multiple reviewers should merge into one surviving blocker with consolidated support rather than counting as separate blockers.

assertions.description: Final derived verdict is REVISE
Output shows the merged blocker accumulating support (for example support 3/3 or merged_from metadata)
At least one blocking issue mentions the missing authorization guard

evals.name: code-distinct-separate
evals.prompt:
Review this code diff with a quorum. Use claude:sonnet, gemini:pro, and codex as the panel. Run in --mode code.

The diff is at /Users/Shared/git/agent-skills/quorum-review-workspace/iteration-2/code-distinct-separate.patch
evals.expected_output: Should keep the missing authorization and sensitive logging as separate blockers. Related issues at the same location must not be merged into one umbrella issue.

assertions.description: Final derived verdict is REVISE
Output includes at least two distinct blocking issues
At least one issue mentions logging sensitive data or card numbers

evals.name: code-invalidated-blocker
evals.prompt:
Review this code diff with a quorum. Use claude:sonnet, gemini:pro, and codex as the panel. Run in --mode code and let the verifier be auto-selected outside the panel.

The diff is at /Users/Shared/git/agent-skills/quorum-review-workspace/iteration-2/code-invalidated-blocker.patch
evals.expected_output: Should surface any initial concern about token extraction, then have the independent verifier invalidate the false blocker because the diff already validates the bearer token format. Final verdict should be APPROVED.

assertions.description: Final derived verdict is APPROVED
Output includes an INVALIDATED blocker or invalidation rationale
Output shows that the external verification stage was exercised

evals.name: code-broad-narrow
evals.prompt:
Review this code diff with a quorum. Use claude:sonnet, gemini:pro, and codex as the panel. Run in --mode code.

The diff is at /Users/Shared/git/agent-skills/quorum-review-workspace/iteration-2/code-broad-narrow.patch
evals.expected_output: Should keep the broad search-abuse concern separate from the narrower result-set concern. Similar issues should not launder support counts into one merged blocker.

assertions.description: Final derived verdict is REVISE
Output shows distinct issues rather than one broad umbrella blocker absorbing support
At least one issue mentions the search query or result-set concern
